commit_scope: Add the plane-aware organ-offer membrane and heal native-instance observation. Organs declare which observation planes they offer through which channels, to which audiences, with ask-first questions, disclosure, receipts, refusal modes, and honored channel-interface modes. Hati mesh channel offers can lower into the same membrane, and the selector consumes only actual organ/offer responses. The native deploy path now routes the production-manifest attention probe explicitly, keeps the broad Host router above the base API and below BML-specific rows, posts the BML kernel-image canary from a request file, and counts BML and production-manifest front doors independently.

commands: focused fkwu native run: flatten organ-offer-band with cached local bin-go carrier, then run cached fkwu fourth kernel against the table
fourth_arm_outputs: organ-offer: fkwu first output 63 from form/form-stdlib/tests/organ-offer-band.fk; manifest row added: organ-offer fks 63
local_validation.notes: The organ-offer proof used the fourth-kernel fkwu runtime directly against a pre-flattened table. The deploy/observer proof used shell syntax checks, the Hostinger deploy-path contract, the runtime-surface unit tests, public native header probes, and runtime_surface_report.py. The local API venv was created from declared dependencies because the host Python lacked pywebpush.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after push/PR. This is a new Form stdlib recipe, proof band, teaching, index row, fourth-arm manifest row, native deploy ingress fix, canary hardening, and runtime observer correction.

deploy_validation.notes: Pre-push public observation on 2026-06-22: production is at origin/main 5db4ffed4ce34c2dec3b7eb9e9b57c555bf86476. The BML native front door is live: /api/ready and /api/utils/kernel_status return X-Form-Router native-kernel, and POST /api/substrate/kernel-image/proposals returns accepted-preview with handler api_substrate_kernel_image_proposals and python_authority false. The production-manifest attention probe /api/attention/kernel-runtime still returns HTTP 404 without X-Form-Router until this branch deploys. After this observer fix, scripts/runtime_surface_report.py --json reports 61 BML read routes served, 34 production-manifest capable routes, and 0 production-manifest served routes pre-deploy.

phase_gate.reason: Local fkwu proof, deploy-path proof, observer proof, and public pre-deploy observation passed; CI, merge, deploy settlement, and public post-deploy verification remain pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/organ-offer-band.fk proves six claims: audience-specific offer, withholding, ask-first, interface withholding, selector discipline, and Hati mesh lowering.
Focused fkwu native proof returned first output 63 for organ-offer after table emission; form/fourth-arm-bands.txt registers organ-offer fks 63.

bash scripts/test_hostinger_deploy_form_paths.sh passed, proving the Hostinger deploy path includes form stdlib and BML catalog changes, the native-first Host router priority 1160, explicit /api/attention/kernel-runtime ingress, and file-backed BML proposal canary payload.

api/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -q tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py passed 5 tests, proving BML served routes are counted independently when the production-manifest attention probe is unread.

Pre-deploy runtime_surface_report.py --json observed 61 served BML read routes, 104 capable kernel-first routes, /api/ready native, /api/attention/kernel-runtime 404 without router header, and 0 served production-manifest routes.
Public pre-deploy probes confirmed /api/utils/kernel_status and /api/substrate/kernel-image/proposals are native-kernel; /api/attention/kernel-runtime remains the route to heal through this deploy.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Organs can now publish a sovereign capability envelope by plane, audience, channel, question gate, disclosure, receipt, refusal, and interface. Callers receive organ/offer, organ/ask-first, or organ/withheld, and selectors can only consume organ/offer rows.
public_endpoints: none added; this branch heals existing native deploy ingress and observation
test_flows: fkwu proof flow: organ-offer-band returns 63 on the fourth kernel from a pre-flattened table.
mesh lowering flow: a Hati sensor channel with offer:observe-sensor-field lowers into an organ offer that honors witness and returns organ/offer.
native observation flow: runtime_surface_report.py now reports BML read-front-door served routes even while /api/attention/kernel-runtime is still a public 404 pre-deploy.

deploy healing flow: the next Hostinger deploy will expose /api/attention/kernel-runtime through the kernel-router production-manifest service and keep the broad native-first Host router above the base API router.
